summary: Implementation plan for redesigning the 3-step style analysis pipeline into a 4-step methodology-focused pipeline. Step 1 extracts Voice DNA (tone, rhythm, vocabulary patterns), Step 2 analyzes per-chapter methods with position/purpose/count instead of quotes, Step 3 (NEW) performs cross-chapter statistical analysis in pure Python to find variation patterns, Step 4 synthesizes everything into a content-free style prompt. The key insight is separating WHAT was written from HOW the writer thinks.
